entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, a major source of vegetable oil and a global dietary staple

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of oil in peanut seeds, a key target for breeding programs to reduce edible oil imports

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where peanut is a major source of vegetable oil

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: Country where peanut breeding programs are intensifying efforts to increase oil content

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to generate data from 49 peanut cultivars to identify candidate genes and molecular markers

entities.name: MOLECULAR MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic tools developed for seed oil content across multiple environments

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method that identified 5458 differentially expressed genes involved in oil synthesis

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes identified through transcriptome analysis, including positive and negative DEGs involved in oil synthesis

entities.name: OIL SYNTHESIS PROCESS
entities.description: The biological process of producing oil in peanuts

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A method used to identify 48 significant InDel markers associated with seed oil content

entities.name: INDEL MARKERS
entities.description: Insertion/deletion markers associated with seed oil content across five environments

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOMICS
entities.description: A method used to detect common gene clusters across chromosomes

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to detect common gene clusters across chromosomes

entities.name: GENE CLUSTERS
entities.description: Groups of genes located on chromosomes, with 147 common clusters detected

entities.name: CHROMOSOMES
entities.description: Genetic structures where gene clusters are located, with 17 identified in the study

entities.name: A03 CHROMOSOME
entities.description: A specific chromosome where an InDel cluster associated with seed oil content was detected

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE
entities.description: A group of candidate genes on the A03 chromosome with variable alleles affecting oil content

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method that can utilize the identified locus for improving peanut oil content

entities.name: PEANUT BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Organized efforts to increase oil content in newly bred peanut varieties
